text.value: A focus grants +2 to the ability for tests within that specialty.

subtitle.value: Arcane Lore, Healing, Historical Lore, Natural Lore...
Bows, Brawling, Initiative, Light Blades, Stealth...
Axes, Bludgeons, Heavy Blades, Intimidation, Might...

text.value: Dwarves & Qunari: +2 | Qunari/Tal-Vashoth: -1 to resist spells. Set above as net modifier.
Talents are special abilities gained through class advancement or the Talent talent. Each has three degrees: Novice, Journeyman, and Master.
Specializations are unlocked at level 6 and represent deeper mastery of your class archetype. Track your specialization in your Notes.

Mages begin with four spells. New spells are learned via training or at certain levels. Casting requires a Magic (spell school) test vs. target number. Failure on a 1,2,3 on the Dragon Die may cause a Mishap.

hint.value: What connects your character to others?

text.value: Roll 3d6 eight times and consult the Determining Abilities table (p.11). A result of 3=-2, 4-5=-1, 6-8=0, 9-11=1, 12-14=2, 15-17=3, 18=4. You may then swap any two ability scores.

Your background represents your culture and upbringing. It determines your race, available class choices, starting ability increases, and starting focuses. Refer to Chapter 1 of the rulebook for each background's full details.
After choosing your background, apply your ability score increases and starting focuses on the Abilities & Focuses page of your character sheet.
Choose your class. Your background determines which classes are available to you. Mages use Magic and Willpower, Rogues use Dexterity and Communication, and Warriors use Strength and Constitution.
Warrior: 30 + (Constitution x 5) | Rogue: 25 + (Constitution x 4) | Mage: 20 + (Constitution x 3). Set your Max Health and Current Health accordingly.
Starting Mana = (Magic x 10) + (Willpower x 5). Set your Max Mana and Current Mana below.
Check all weapon groups your class grants you. Refer to your class description for the full list.
Consult your class table for your new class ability. Add +1 to one ability. You may also gain a new focus or talent. Update your Max Health based on your class's health formula.
